title: tarenna odorata
intro: Tarenna odorata, also known as the Red Gold or Golden Tarenna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tarenna odorata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Tarenna odorata include infusions, decoctions, and dried extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams.
